title: Do Re Mi Tales
description: Do Re Mi Tales adds rich lore from the Do Re Mi World, a universe where music shapes everything. Discover book lores about characters and resources, unique weapons, and cientific-magical items as you explore this mysterious, melody-driven adventure!
body:
![Do Re Mi Tales title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33f4b22f9ce46d20f29ec9497b9b5efd193ef751.png)

In a universe where everything we know was born from sound, melody, and music, get ready to explore a completely new world and uncover the mysteries of the universe's creation by the hands of Isabel, the goddess of music!


Everything began with the Ilums, primordial particles born from the intelligence and autonomy of living sounds. They gave rise to feelings, the people of Lumandias, Do Re Mi Island, Layla; the celestial heiress and leader of the Dorémiers who fight against the corruption of the Carminox during the Great War and- well... It's better if you discover it on your own!





Additions:



- A new mineable ore with armor, weapons and tools
- Three new magical-bard-like weapons
- A new biome featuring a new mob, The Rubber Chicken (Yes, you read that right.)
- New villager profession including over ten books with lores
- Achievements that guides you through this new universe
- Three new music discs
- And more!

Requirements:



- Fabric API for 1.20.1 (0.92.3+1.20.1)
- TerraBlender (Fabric 1.20.1-3.0.1.7)
  - (Everything else BUT the new biome works well without it.)


This mod has compatibilty with Roughly Enough Items for Fabric 1.20.1. It is strongly recommended to play with it! (Remember to also download the dependencies for REI!)




This mod introduces the World of Do Re Mi to Vanilla Minecraft, a universe filled with rich lore, intriguing characters, captivating stories, magic, and music! Discover countless new tales through items, books, and weapons, adding depth to your casual play.



Begin your journey by crafting a Frequency Extractor to collect Ilums. Perhaps it involves halting the flow of a musical note using a jukebox and a disc? Uncover this and many more processes through in-game hints as you delve into the mysterious world of Do Re Mi!

![In-game UI Spoilers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4c476ecabbbfebfc207a11ec86b30b0f7b08220.jpeg)


As you explore the world, you may encounter charming or oddly-shaped creatures within a dense, vibrant forest. Perhaps a certain book can shed light on their nature... could they even assist you in your journey?


![General items view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3293d78a3b5b323c112e41accef9eb027dce569d.png)


Obtaining stronger materials won’t always be as simple as mining and smelting ores. Some may require more intricate processes, but with the right friends, you might just find the help you need...


![Villager Profession apresentation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4646d2edfbc96833b428d00c260c8106902093c8.png)


And more!

Uncover the secrets of this enchanting world at your own pace. Become a new enthusiast for the tales of Do Re Mi and let its stories, music, and magic captivate your imagination!


----------------------------------------------------

Important note!



This mod is a passion project developed entirely by one person and is still a work in progress! As such, there may be experimental issues, including potential lag or other technical problems. Additionally, it has not been tested in multiplayer environments.

The Do Re Mi World universe and its lore are entirely fictional and have no connection to real-life individuals, stories, or other universes. This is an original creation made purely for fun and as a hobby, please enjoy it with an open mind and don’t take anything too seriously!

Anyways, thanks for reading and possibly playing! <3
